abilities.description: A burst of damaging frost slows enemy movement and attack rate in the targeted area.
abilities.name: Crystal Nova
abilities.story: The air temperature around Rylai drops rapidly, chilling all around her to the core.

abilities.description: Encases an enemy unit in ice, prohibiting movement and attack, while dealing damage over time. Lasts 10 seconds on creeps level 6 or lower.
abilities.name: Frostbite
abilities.story: Rylai channels winds from the Blueheart Glacier, imprisoning attackers in thick blocks of ice.

abilities.description: Gives additional mana regeneration to all friendly units on the map. Allies within a 1200 radius of Crystal Maiden receive 3x the mana regeneration. Crystal Maiden herself receives 7x the bonus.
abilities.name: Arcane Aura
abilities.story: Cold temperatures promote the essence of magic, causing Rylai's presence to allow spell usage in abundance.

abilities.description: Slides backward, creating a crystal clone of herself in her place. If the clone takes enough damage or times out, it shatters, Frostbiting enemies in a 450 AoE around its place.
abilities.name: Crystal Clone

abilities.description: Surrounds Crystal Maiden with 100 random icy explosions that slow enemies and deal massive damage. Grants bonus armor while channeling. Lasts 10 seconds.
abilities.name: Freezing Field
abilities.story: Once the place of her exile, Icewrack has become an anchor for Rylai's frigid onslaught.

description: Unleashes a high damage blizzard upon her foes. Wherever Rylai went, the cold went with her. Fields and orchards withered in her wake, leaving her parents no choice but to pack her off to Icewrack, a realm in the frigid north. Under the tutelage of a hermit wizard, Rylai learned to imprison her enemies with a Thick Block of Ice, holding them in place as she Freezes the Ground. Magic flourishes under her, stimulating Arcane Energy Regeneration in all her companions. In the heat of battle, Rylai keeps a cool head. Channeling her Elemental Talents, the Crystal Maiden summons enormous shards of ice from the skies, obliterating all foes foolish enough to remain in her Freezing Field.  Support Disabler Nuker  Blue, Cape, Cute, Female, Icy, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Rylai is one of the oldest heroes from the original DotA in Reign of Chaos DotA. Her title used to be Frost Maiden. In some earlier versions of DotA, Rylai's title was changed to "Batrider" and used Troll Batrider model as default.
In some earlier versions of DotA, Rylai's title was changed to "Batrider" and used Troll Batrider model as default.
